allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} index records via proxy'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d[\\"etfs\\"]\)} ETFs'\); [print\(f' {e[\\"code\\"]} {e[\\"name\\"]} vol={e[\\"latest_volume\\"]} shares={e[\\"total_shares\\"]/1e8 if e[\\"total_shares\\"] else 0:.2f}亿'\) for e in d['etfs']]")
Bash(sleep 3 echo "Frontend: $\(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://localhost:5173\)" echo "API proxy: $\(curl -s http://localhost:5173/api/etfs)
